subject: Re: Tomostar file creation error
body:
Thanks for getting back, glad you got things figured out - copying the list so others can see the solution :-)
Sent from mobile - apologies for brevity
On Dec 23, 2024, at 18:26, Chen Sun <csun@lji.org> wrote:
﻿
Hi Alister,
Thank you for your reply. I figured it out. I should have provided the tilt series mdoc files but I provided the mdoc files in the frames folder instead. Now it works fine. 
Happy holidays!
Best wishes,
Chen
On Mon, Dec 23, 2024 at 6:23 PM Alister Burt <
alisterburt@gmail.com
> wrote:
Hi Chen,
Can you please check the tutorial works in your hands and carefully compare your input data to the tutorial input data…
Likely causes
- mdocs written by external programs e.g sorted mdocs from PACE have been known to cause issues
- your frame series data became unselected after failures in motion and CTF estimation, if so use change_selection
Good luck and happy processing,
Alister
Sent from mobile - apologies for brevity
On Dec 23, 2024, at 18:08, 'Chen Sun' via Warp <
warp-em@googlegroups.com
> wrote:
﻿Hello,
I encountered the following error message when running "
WarpTools ts_import --mdocs mdoc --frameseries warp_frameseries --tilt_exposure 4 --min_intensity 0.3 --dont_invert --output tomostar" : 
No images left for L6b_ts_003_001_26.0_Dec21_16.33.12.tif.mdoc after removing tilts based on selection status, max tilt angle and masked fraction criteria
Successfully parsed 0 MDOC files, 0 failed
It didn't create any tomostar file in the end. I didn't set any criteria for tilt angle and masked fraction criteria. Has anyone seen the same error? Any help would be appreciated. 
Best,
Chen
